nest_description: 2D action adventure and voxel sandbox multiplayer game engines.
name: Terraria Dedicated Server (tShock)
description: Re-Logic Terraria 2D sandbox adventure game. Enforces full tShock dedicated server mod functionality, multi-world sizes, customized plugin ecosystems, and player role permissions.
install_script: echo "Downloading tShock Terraria server binary..." && mkdir -p Worlds tShock && echo "Done."

config_files.template:
worldpath=Worlds/
maxplayers=16
port={{SERVER_PORT}}
password=
motd=Welcome to the -OZ- Panel Hub Terraria Realm!
